title: Verhoeff’s Iron Hematoxylin Staining
author: Jeff Z. Chen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.be9sjh6e

steps.title: Acetone to fix If slides keep...
steps.instruction: Acetone to fix If slides keep falling off slide, air dry for 30 mintues before fixation

steps.title: Ferric chloride (2% wt/vol) Water 3...
steps.instruction: Ferric chloride (2% wt/vol) Water 3 washes Check slide for differention at 1m30s and for every 30s afterward * Halt staining when nuclei and elastin fibers are still black with weak background. *** If over-differentiated, go back to the step 3.
